title: mikania houstoniana var. guatemalensis
intro: Mikania houstoniana var. guatemalensis, also known as Guatemalan or Mexican pennywort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to Central America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Guatemalan pennywort include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and support immune function. Guatemalan pennywort can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular herbal remedy among those seeking natural alternatives to conventional medicine.
